name: dom-hover-001: mouseover removes element via setTimeout
description: Hovering #target triggers onmouseover which calls setTimeout(remove, 1000). After 1s, #target is removed via removeChild. The remaining #green div should be green (not red).

events.message: Step 2: Hover over #target to trigger onmouseover
Step 3: Wait for setTimeout(remove, 1000) to fire — #target should disappear
